title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TUBIG INDANGAN CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SIMUNUL, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO RATAG HARUON CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2251 / 58 OG No. 48, 7833 (November 26, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3510, June 16, 1962 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TUBIG INDANGAN CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SIMUNUL, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO RATAG HARUON CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Tubig Indangan Central Elementary School in the Municipality of Simunul, Province of Sulu, is changed to Ratag Haruon Central Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1962.
